attribution: all commits, author-neutral (the self page audits everything; foreign pages audit agent-attributed commits only)
auditor: dos-kernel 0.25.0 at `4ea6a2a` — the range's own end commit, so the auditor and the audited history pin together; includes the [#79](https://github.com/anthony-chaudhary/dos-kernel/issues/79)/[#81](https://github.com/anthony-chaudhary/dos-kernel/issues/81) fire-narrowing fixes

range.commits_note: the full visible history since the 2026-06-10 public seed

notes.headline: All three are convention-driven empty re-stamp commits; the receipts are below. This is **page #1 of the index, the self-grade**: the scoreboard names no other repository before publishing its own verdict, and ours is deliberately not airbrushed to zero.
notes.verdict: Raw and adjudicated agree here: zero of the three flags is an auditor artifact, so adjudication removed nothing. (Before the #79/#81 fire-narrowing landed in the auditor — `86f437f`, in this same range — the sweep carried additional artifact fires; that history, hand-adjudicated, is in the [methodology's false-positive section](../methodology.md).)
notes.receipts: All three flags come from one renumber event (the docs/310 plan-number collision). The convention itself is under design review — [#80](https://github.com/anthony-chaudhary/dos-kernel/issues/80) proposes making re-stamps carry a plan-doc line so they witness themselves — and if that lands, this page's adjudicated count drops to zero the honest way: by changing the commits, never the auditor.
notes.reproduce: The auditor version is pinned to the same commit the range ends on, so one checkout gives you both the tool and the history it graded:

records.subject: docs(plans): re-stamp the work-account CLI verb post-renumber (docs/310 P3)
records.rationale: A deliberate empty commit: this workspace's re-stamp convention re-anchors a plan phase's ship-stamp after a plan-number collision, so the claim rests on subject text alone **by design**. The auditor is right to count it.

records.subject: docs(plans): re-stamp the severity-gate wiring post-renumber (docs/310 P2)
docs(plans): re-stamp the work-kind account leaf post-renumber (docs/310 P1)
